# alAsil Catalog Taxonomy (auto-generated 2026-04-22)

Use this map to figure out WHAT WE STOCK across categories, families,
and variants. Values shown here are only the ones that currently exist
in our catalog — if a variant is not listed, we do not have it.

For PRECISE stock / price / SKU queries, call a tool (filterCatalog,
searchProducts). This file is for ORIENTATION — what families exist,
what chip options exist for a family, etc.

Total in-stock SKUs: 381

## Quick disambiguation hints

When a customer says a short phrase, this table says which category it belongs to.

| Customer phrase | Maps to |
|-----------------|---------|
| iphone 17 / 17 pro / 17 pro max / air / 17e | iPhone → family is the number |
| iphone 16 / 16 pro / 16 plus / 16 pro max | iPhone → iPhone 16 family |
| ipad pro / ipad air / ipad mini / ipad | iPad — watch for chip (M4 / M5 / A16 / A17 Pro) |
| macbook air / macbook pro / mac mini / mac studio / imac | Mac — chip determines year |
| airpods / airpods pro / airpods max / airpods 4 | AirPods — gen number is often in title |
| apple watch / watch ultra / watch series / watch se | Apple Watch — series number on title |
| pencil / apple pencil / pencil pro / pencil usb-c | Accessory (category) — spec lookup via apple_specs.md |
| case / cover / folio / band / charger / cable / adapter | Accessory — always filter category=Accessory |
| jbl / bose / sony / harman | Speaker/Earbuds/Headphones by product line |
| dyson airwrap / supersonic / corrale | Dyson category |

## Regeneration
This file is generated by `scripts/build-taxonomy.js`. Re-run whenever new product lines are added to Shopify. Last run: 2026-04-22.
